prompt: Toggle Wi-Fi off then back on. Fast path: `cerebellum 'settings toggle_wifi OFF'` then `cerebellum 'settings toggle_wifi ON'`, or `networksetup -setairportpower en0 off && networksetup -setairportpower en0 on`. Otherwise use Control Center > Wi-Fi, or System Settings > Wi-Fi. The eval checks that Wi-Fi ends up On AND that a toggle has been observed (state changed at least once since setup).
